title: Command Center — Pipeline command center and human gate queue
summary: This feature delivery ships the Command Center Pipeline command center: run-state field split, enriched task envelopes, a read-only config API, DashboardModuleShell extraction, and P9 grid and timeline migration. The server exposes humanAttention and nextCommand as separate StageCell fields, adds runDir and optional…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.
review.spec_contracts_note: Three embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec dependency; contract run logs under .pan/work/contract-runs/.
intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor ship ratification at 2026-06-08T10:00:00Z with human_ratified_diff true; staged diff limited to 21 touch-set client paths.
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
